author: anon-581fd578
content: Two problems: (1) HotReloadClient::connect() is called inside hot_reload_indicator() which runs on every render frame, spamming stderr with connection errors. Fix: remove the live connection attempt — just show a static indicator. The client is exercised in the test suite anyway. (2) The app pages may not fill the window because scroll_view/v_stack don't have explicit sizing. Fix: add flex_grow to the router and page containers so content fills available space.
